title: quercus dentata subsp. eudentata
intro: Quercus dentata subsp. eudentata, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak or Japanese evergreen, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus dentata subsp. eudentata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and lowering cholesterol levels. Quercus dentata subsp. eudentata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
